text: Tenders must be received no later than 12:00 on the closing date; late tenders are rejected.
notes: submission deadline

id: # ---- your rows below this line (no leading #) ----

text: The contractor must supply and build the required temporary infrastructure as outlined in the scope document.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: temporary infrastructure must be fulfilled

text: The contractor must modify and refurbish all infrastructure on site so it is fit for the purposes outlined in the scope document.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: modification and refurbishment are required

text: The contractor must deliver an agreed solution without causing excessive disturbance to ongoing activities or operations on site.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: excessive disturbance would fail the requirement

text: The contractor must use circular economy building practices where possible, including reused materials or materials diverted from waste.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: circular economy approach is required where possible

text: The contractor must be able to deliver a temporary building solution.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker from pages 7-8: bidder would be rejected if unable to do this

text: The contractor must use circular economy building practices.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker from pages 7-8: circular economy practice required

text: The contractor must act with due consideration to the principles in the Resources and Waste Strategy for England and associated legislation.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker from pages 7-8: bidder would be rejected if unable to do this

text: The contractor must support WLWA's vision while providing industry-leading innovation and best practice.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker from pages 7-8: bidder would be rejected if unable to do this

text: The contractor must deliver all phases of the project by 30 September 2024.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: inability to deliver by the expected date means rejection

text: Tenders must be submitted by email to procurement@westlondonwaste.gov.uk in accordance with the instructions in the ITT.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: tender would not be reviewed if submitted elsewhere

text: The tender must include an executive summary and introduction.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: required part of the tender submission

text: The tender must include responses to the method statements.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: method statement response is required

text: The bidder must provide a completed pricing schedule; failure to do so will result in a fail.
notes: no completed pricing schedule equals fail

text: The bidder must provide at least two references.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: at least two references are required

text: The bidder must complete the contractor vetting form for the bid to be considered.
notes: bid will not be considered without the completed contractor vetting form

text: The tender must include Annex 5, the WLWA Low Carbon Procurement Charter.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: required document in final tender

text: The tender must include Annex 7, the declaration documents.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: required declaration documents in final tender

text: Bidders must submit only one compliant solution.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: one compliant solution is required

text: Successful bidders will be required to sign WLWA's Climate Commitment Charter and consider how they measure and reduce carbon and GHG emissions.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: successful bidder must sign the charter and support low-carbon objectives

text: Bidders must write a summary of the social value generated within existing operations and state what initiatives and schemes will be adopted within the scope of this contract.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: social value response required

text: Bidders must respond to all questions in the e-tendering response questionnaires and ensure answers are clear and concise.
source_clause: 6.4 Assessment questions for completion by bidders
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: all questionnaire answers required

text: All proposals contained in a tender must be capable of delivery and must have commitment from within the bidder's organisation.
source_clause: 6.4 Assessment questions for completion by bidders
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: proposals must be deliverable and internally committed

text: Bidders are not permitted to submit variant bids for the same contract to the Authority.
source_clause: 6.4 Assessment questions for completion by bidders
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: variant bids are not permitted

text: Bidders must identify whether subcontracting or consortium arrangements apply to their tender and precisely which entity they propose to be the contractor.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: subcontracting or consortium arrangements and contractor entity must be identified

text: A bidder proposing to enter into a contract with WLWA must rely on its own enquiries and on the contract terms and conditions, subject to the limitations and restrictions specified.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: bidder must rely on its own enquiries and contract terms

text: Bidders must keep the contents of the ITT confidential and must not copy or reproduce it except as permitted.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: confidentiality condition applies to the ITT

text: Bidders are responsible for clearly identifying any confidential or commercially sensitive information to WLWA in the qualification questionnaire template.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: confidential or commercially sensitive information must be identified

text: No statements may be made to the media about any tender, its contents, or related proposals without WLWA's prior written consent.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: media statements require prior written consent

text: Any attempt by bidders or their advisers to influence the contract award process may result in the bidder being disqualified.
source_clause: 6.9 Bidder conduct and conflicts of interest
notes: explicit disqualification risk for influencing the award process

text: WLWA may disqualify any bidder that does not submit a compliant tender in accordance with the instructions in this ITT.
notes: explicit disqualification risk for non-compliant tender

text: WLWA may disqualify any bidder that is guilty of serious misrepresentation in relation to its tender, expression of interest, or the tender process.
notes: explicit disqualification risk for serious misrepresentation

text: Bidders must submit a tender strictly in accordance with the requirements set out in the ITT; evasive, unclear or hedged tenders may be discounted and may be taken as a rejection.
notes: human-labelled deal-breaker: evasive, unclear or hedged tenders may be rejected

text: Bidders must submit method statements; any bidder that fails a qualification question will be eliminated from the process and the technical and commercial evaluations will not be considered.
notes: explicit elimination risk for failing a qualification question
